creator: woju@freebsd.ntu.edu.tw
text:
queso can determin remote OS type.
http://www.apostols.org/projectz/queso/

Fix: 

Please commit it, thanks.
How-To-Repeat: fetch -o- ftp://freebsd.ntu.edu.tw/freebsd/woju/ports/queso.tgz | \
   tar xvfz - -C /usr/ports/net
cd /usr/ports/net/queso
make package

For binary packages (built under 2.2) --
news[root]:~# pkg_add ftp://freebsd.ntu.edu.tw/freebsd/pkg/queso-980922.tgz
news[root]:~# queso www.yahoo.com
204.71.200.74:80        * FreeBSD, NetBSD, OpenBSD
news[root]:~# queso www.sun.com
192.9.49.33:80  *- Firewalled Solaris 2.x
news[root]:~# queso www.ibm.com
204.146.18.33:80        * IBM AIX 4
news[root]:~# queso www.microsoft.com
207.46.130.149:80       * Windoze NT firewalled (like *.microsoft.com)
